description_long: This shotgun features a long, cylindrical barrel with a matte black finish and a ribbed pump-action fore-end, which is colored in a muted olive green. The receiver and barrel are constructed from metal, while the pistol grip and pump are made from a polymer or composite material in a matching olive tone. The shotgun lacks a traditional shoulder stock, instead utilizing a pistol grip for compact handling. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionally sized, providing protection for the trigger while allowing easy access. Shell holders are integrated along the pump, suggesting readiness for rapid reloading. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for urban environments where maneuverability and reliability are prioritized.
description: A matte black, pump-action shotgun with a long barrel, olive green pistol grip, and ribbed fore-end, lacking a traditional stock. Shell holders are integrated on the pump for quick reloading.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, olive green pistol grip, ribbed pump, and shell holders clearly visible.
description_view_1: Front-on view down the barrel, emphasizing the circular muzzle and the alignment of the barrel and magazine tube.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the features of view 0, with the pistol grip and pump visible from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the pistol grip and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long with vented ribbing along the top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
